channel.title: People on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in People on Detention Pipeline

item.title: Tae D. Johnson — Former ICE Acting Director, Now Sabot Consulting
item.description: Johnson served 31 years at ICE/INS, rising to Acting ICE Director (January 2021-July 2023). Prior roles:

item.title: Antoine McCord — DHS CIO, Former Anduril Employee with Active Equity
item.description: Antoine McCord, Chief Information Officer of the Department of Homeland Security, is a former Anduril Industries employee who holds active Anduril equity (RSUs, 401(k), ESPP, stock) and has Anduril…

item.title: David Venturella
item.description: David Venturella is the single most significant revolving-door figure in the current detention-industrial complex. His career path – ICE official to GEO Group executive to Trump administration DHS…

item.title: Edward D'Alelio — Blue Owl Capital Director, Former Trump Entertainment Resorts Board
item.description: Blue Owl Capital director who previously served on the board of Trump Entertainment Resorts. His dual connection — to both the investment firm profiting from ICE warehouse purchases and the Trump…

item.title: Edward Forst — GSA Administrator, Former Goldman Sachs AND Deutsche Bank Employee
item.description: Edward Forst is the Administrator of the General Services Administration — the federal agency that oversees government property acquisitions.

item.title: John Russell McGranahan — Former GSA General Counsel with Blue Owl Investments
item.description: Former General Counsel at the General Services Administration — the federal agency that typically brokers government real estate deals — through November 2025. His financial disclosures reveal…

item.title: Daniel A. Bible
item.description: Daniel A. Bible was ICE’s top career official in charge of immigration detention, who left the agency just days before the 2024 presidential election to become an executive at [[geo-group|GEO Group]]…

item.title: Daniel H. Ragsdale
item.description: Daniel H. Ragsdale is an American lawyer and law enforcement official who transitioned from the second-highest position at ICE directly to a senior executive role at [[geo-group|GEO Group]], the…

item.title: Matthew T. Albence
item.description: Matthew T. Albence is a former Acting Director of U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement who joined [[geo-group|GEO Group]] as a senior executive after leaving government service. He is notable for…
